title: CHARBONE Announces First Hydrogen Supply Hub in Ontario
content: CHARBONE CORPORATION has announced the development of its first Hydrogen Supply Hub in Ontario, marking a significant milestone in its Canadian expansion strategy. This new facility will serve as a dedicated physical storage and local distribution center, providing reliable, on-demand cleaner fuel to industrial, advanced manufacturing, and mobility customers across Southern Ontario. By leveraging existing infrastructure, including storage tubes, CHARBONE aims to secure local inventory, control logistics, and reduce dependency on third-party providers. CEO Dave Gagnon emphasized that investing in physical assets reinforces the company's commitment to supply security and operational control. The hub is a cornerstone of CHARBONEâ€™s broader "hub-and-spoke" model designed to build a scalable network across North America. Additionally, the company appointed Momentum Public Relations Inc. to manage investor relations.
author: Analysts Account
